name: Huachinango En Tostado (Tostadas with Red Sna
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the lettuce.
2. Cook the fish in one cup of water with the salt, laurel, thyme, marjoram, pepper, garlic, and vinegar for fifteen minutes or until the fish can be flaked with a fork. Drain and shred.
3. Fry onion, tomatoes, and parsley in olive oil for five minutes.
4. Add the shredded fish and olives to the pan.
5. Fry tortillas in fat until lightly toasted.
6. Spread a spoonful of the fish mixture on each tortilla, add a layer of shredded lettuce, and sprinkle with the hot fat in which the tortillas were fried.
Yield: Six servings.
